content.scenarioHint: 你收到一个太大无法下载的视频文件，想请对方改用云盘链接发送，并确保链接可公开访问。

options.text: Could you upload the video to Dropbox and share a link set to 'Anyone with the link can view'?
The video is too big—can you just email it again?
Why is the file so large? Can you make it smaller?
I can't open the video—maybe try converting it to MP4?

content.explanation: 正确答案提出清晰的替代方案（使用Dropbox）并明确权限设置（Anyone with the link can view），符合专业沟通标准。选项2只是重复发送，未解决文件过大问题；选项3是抱怨而非提出解决方案；选项4错误地假设对方需要转换格式，而非改变传输方式。

options.text: Yes, please email the ZIP file—make sure it's password-protected for security.
Just use Dropbox—it's faster than email.
I don't care how you send it, just get it to me.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅接受替代方案，还主动提出安全建议（密码保护），体现专业性。选项2强行推荐其他工具，未尊重对方提议；选项3态度冷漠，缺乏协作；选项4回避问题，未提供解决方案。
content.speakerText: The presentation slides won't upload to the shared folder—it keeps timing out. Could I email them as a ZIP instead?
content.speakerTextCn: 演示文稿上传共享文件夹总是超时，能改用邮件发ZIP压缩包吗？
